items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior regarding agent-specific rate limits, but there is no direct evidence provided in the prior steps that addresses this specific functionality. The prior steps focus on various booking and user interactions but do not include any checks or validations related to agent-specific rate limits. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to determine if the expected result is met.
